com.sun.jdi.request/EventRequestManager/.name: accessWatchpointRequests
com.sun.jdi.request/EventRequestManager/.description:
Return an unmodifiable list of the enabled and disabled access
watchpoint requests.

info.excerpt:
Return an unmodifiable list of the enabled and disabled access
watchpoint requests.
